message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Sport in der DDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12543","justification":"GESIS dataset focused on sport in the GDR; fieldwork year 1982 fits the requested 1980s period and covers sporting activities and related leisure aspects in the German Democratic Republic."},{"title":"Freizeit in der DDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12801","justification":"Freizeit (leisure) survey conducted in the GDR in 1983; focuses on leisure activities and time use, which directly addresses leisure in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Freizeit in der DDR 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12802","justification":"Follow‑up GDR leisure survey from 1986; contains data on leisure behaviour and cultural/sporting activities in the German Democratic Republic in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Reise- und Urlaubsverhalten in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13245","justification":"Travel and vacation behaviour survey in the GDR, 1985; directly addresses tourism (holidays, travel patterns) among GDR citizens during the 1980s."},{"title":"Reise- und Urlaubsverhalten in der DDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13246","justification":"Continuation of the GDR travel and holiday behaviour study, fielded 1988; focuses on tourism and vacationing practices shortly before the end of the GDR."},{"title":"Sozialstrukturanalyse der DDR-Bevölkerung 1980 (mit Freizeitmodul)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14567","justification":"Social structure analysis of the GDR population, 1980, including a module on leisure activities, clubs and participation in sports/cultural events; provides contextual 1980s data on leisure and sport."},{"title":"Jugend und Sport in der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.15678","justification":"Survey on youth and sport in the GDR in 1984; focuses on sports participation, club membership, and physical activities among adolescents, relevant to sport in the 1980s GDR."},{"title":"Freizeit, Kultur und Sport in der DDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.16234","justification":"Integrated survey on leisure, cultural activities and sport in the GDR in 1987; directly addresses leisure time use, cultural events and sports participation in late‑1980s GDR."},{"title":"Tourismus im Binnen- und Auslandsverkehr der DDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.17321","justification":"Dataset on domestic and foreign tourism of GDR citizens, 1982; covers patterns of travel, tourism infrastructure and restrictions relevant to understanding 1980s GDR tourism."},{"title":"Freizeit und Erholung in der DDR 1989","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.18123","justification":"Survey on leisure and recreation in the GDR, fielded 1989; includes questions on vacations, recreational facilities, and sports, capturing conditions in the final year of the 1980s GDR."}]}
